title: Contract extension gives UVA football coach Tony Elliott $1 million raise
description: Elliott and Cavaliers athletic director Carla Williams signed the offer more than a month ago, but despite repeated open-record requests from the Virginian-Pilot and other outlets, UVA did not release the document until Monday.

title: Major UK department store chain in working from home crackdown telling staff to be at office ‘more in person’
